title: GIS Chat for ArcGIS Pro: AI-Powered Natural Language Assistant
description: GIS Chat for ArcGIS Pro is an open-source add-in (C#/WPF) that embeds an LLM-powered chat panel directly inside ArcGIS Pro. Users describe geospatial operations in natural language; the plugin injects live workspace context (layers, bands, CRS, selections) into the prompt and the LLM generates and executes ArcPy code via structured tool calling. Supports five LLM providers including free options (Google Gemini, Ollama). Optional Google Earth Engine integration enables satellite data retrieval from the chat panel.
